title: Containerized CI/CD Pipeline with Jenkins and Docker
description: Designed and implemented a complete CI/CD pipeline using Jenkins, Docker, GitHub, and Nginx. The solution automatically builds and deploys containerized applications through an automated deployment workflow.
problem: Application deployments were performed manually, making releases slow, error-prone, and difficult to reproduce consistently.
solution: Built a containerized Jenkins environment integrated with Docker and GitHub to automate application build and deployment workflows through CI/CD pipelines.
lessonsLearned: Learned Docker socket integration, custom Jenkins image creation, containerized CI/CD architecture, pipeline automation, troubleshooting Jenkins SCM issues, and Docker permission management.

title: Apache Version Audit Automation
description: Ansible playbook that checks Apache service status and retrieves version information across multiple servers.
problem: Apache versions were not tracked consistently across servers.
solution: Implemented a scripted audit that validated service health and version compliance.
lessonsLearned: Standardization makes large fleets easier to manage.

title: Docker Monitoring Stack
description: Monitoring environment built with Prometheus, Grafana and Node Exporter running in Docker containers.
problem: Container metrics were scattered and hard to correlate.
solution: Created a unified monitoring stack with dashboard-based alerting.
lessonsLearned: Integrated monitoring reduces downtime and increases operational confidence.

title: Kubernetes Home Lab
description: Production-like Kubernetes lab environment with deployments, services and networking for learning and testing.
problem: There was no isolated environment for safely testing Kubernetes deployments.
solution: Built a home lab cluster with realistic networking and service definitions.
lessonsLearned: Hands-on labs accelerate learning and reveal real operational challenges.

title: CI/CD Pipeline
description: Automated deployment pipeline using GitHub Actions for continuous integration and deployment.
solution: Built a CI/CD workflow that tested and deployed services automatically.
lessonsLearned: Reliable automation frees engineers to solve higher-level problems.

title: Infrastructure as Code
description: Provisioning cloud infrastructure using Terraform for AWS resources.
problem: Cloud environments were created manually and lacked repeatability.
solution: Implemented infrastructure as code for repeatable AWS deployments.
lessonsLearned: Versioned infrastructure is essential for safe scaling and recovery.

title: Three-Tier DevSecOps CI/CD Pipeline on Kubernetes
description: Designed and implemented an end-to-end DevSecOps pipeline for a full-stack three-tier application using Jenkins, SonarQube, Trivy, Docker, Kubernetes, and ArgoCD. The solution automates code quality checks, security scanning, containerization, and GitOps-based continuous delivery.
problem: Deploying and securing modern applications manually creates operational bottlenecks, inconsistent releases, limited visibility into vulnerabilities, and increased risk of production issues.
solution: Built a complete DevSecOps CI/CD pipeline where Jenkins automates application builds, SonarQube enforces code quality gates, Trivy performs vulnerability scanning, Docker packages services into containers, and ArgoCD continuously synchronizes Kubernetes deployments using a GitOps workflow.
lessonsLearned: Gained hands-on experience implementing DevSecOps practices, integrating security into CI/CD pipelines, managing Kubernetes deployments, configuring GitOps workflows with ArgoCD, securing containerized applications, and automating quality and vulnerability checks before production releases.
